# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository contains a personal academic/research website.

## Tech stack
- Use plain HTML, CSS, and minimal JavaScript only.
- Do not use React, Tailwind, Bootstrap, or other frameworks unless explicitly requested.
- Keep the site fully compatible with GitHub Pages.

## Project structure
- Keep `index.html` in the repository root.
- Put styles in `css/styles.css`.
- Put scripts in `js/main.js`.
- Put future images and downloadable files in `assets/`.
- Put future standalone pages in `pages/`.

## Design guidelines
- Use a futuristic, clean, professional visual style.
- Prefer a dark theme with subtle glow accents.
- Keep typography readable and accessible.
- Keep the layout responsive for desktop and mobile.
- Avoid flashy or excessive animations.

## Content goals
- Present Saranyan Senthivel as an active researcher and software engineer.
- Highlight research areas, selected publications, service activities, and professional links.
- Use clear placeholder content and comments where content still needs to be filled in.

## Coding style
- Write clean, readable, maintainable code.
- Use semantic HTML.
- Keep CSS organized and reusable.
- Add comments for sections that should be customized later.
